steps.title: Identify the scale factor
steps.content: Square A's sides are $154$ times square B's, so the scale factor is $154$.

steps.title: Use area scaling
steps.content: Areas scale by the square of the side-length scale factor, so $k=154^2$.

steps.title: Calculate the area ratio
steps.content: Evaluate the square: $k=154^2=23716$. The answer is 23716.
